question_text: Aankh ka wo kaunsa transparent 'kaanch' jaisa part hai jo light ko sabse pehle andar bhejta hai?
explanation: Cornea aankh ka transparent front part hai jo light ko sabse pehle enter karne deta hai.

question_text: Aankh ka pichla parda (back screen) jis par image banti hai, use kya kehte hain?
explanation: Retina par image form hoti hai jo baad mein signals mein convert hoti hai.

question_text: Aankh ka 'kala chhed' (black hole) jo light ke hisaab se chhota ya bada hota hai, uska naam kya hai?
explanation: Pupil light ke amount ke hisaab se size change karta hai.

question_text: Optic Nerve ka main kaam kya hai?
option_c: Image ke signals ko dimaag (Brain) tak pahunchana
explanation: Optic nerve retina se signals ko brain tak le jata hai.

question_text: Ek normal aur swasth aankh mein Sclera (safed hissa) ka rang kaisa hona chahiye?
explanation: Healthy sclera aam taur par safed hota hai.

question_text: Pupil ke piche kaunsa part hota hai jo light ko Retina par focus karta hai?
explanation: Lens light ko bend karke retina par focus karta hai.

question_text: Tez light (Bright light) mein hamara Pupil kaisa ho jata hai?
explanation: Bright light mein pupil constrict karta hai taaki light kam enter kare.

question_text: Light ka aankh mein sahi rasta (Path) kaunsa hai?
explanation: Light pehle cornea se, phir pupil aur lens se hoti hui retina tak pahunchti hai.

question_text: Aankh ka rangin hissa (jaise kisi ki aankh bhuri ya neeli hoti hai) use kya kehte hain?
explanation: Iris aankh ka colored part hota hai.

question_text: Agar kisi ka Cornea 'Dhundhla' (Cloudy) ho jaye, toh kya wo normal vision hai?
explanation: Cloudy cornea normal vision ka sign nahi hai.
